Product Details
PSD Series

Pneumatic sealing profiles suitable for air cylinder systems with stable dynamic sealing requirements.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

PSD Series

Suitable for pneumatic systems that prioritize stable dynamic sealing, practical wear resistance, and predictable operation.

PSD series profiles are commonly used where cylinders require stable dynamic sealing behavior, balanced wear performance, and reliable air control across repeated motion cycles.

Dynamic Sealing Stability

Helps maintain sealing consistency during repeated reciprocating motion in pneumatic cylinders.

Balanced Wear

Supports practical service life under routine cylinder movement and contact conditions.

Operational Consistency

A practical choice for air systems requiring repeatable motion and dependable sealing response.
